zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Peyton於1746年出生在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫時，她的父親Benjamin William Peyton41歲，母親Eleanor Bell Corprew44歲。她於大約1766年與William M Swafford在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州蘭多夫結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1839年1月29日在她的家鄉享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Peyton于1746年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫时，她的父亲Benjamin William Peyton41岁，母亲Eleanor Bell Corprew44岁。她于大约1766年与William M Swafford在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1839年1月29日在她的家乡享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Gold Nuggets Found
historicEvents.description: "In 1799, in Little Meadow Creak located in Cabarrus County, North Carolina a large yellow """"rock"""" was found by Conrad Reed. A few years later it was determined that the """"rock"""" was a gold nugget."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Legends of America- Reed Gold Mine, North Carolina- First Gold Discovery

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Peyton was born in 1746, in Randolph, North Carolina, United States, her father, Benjamin William Peyton, was 41 and her mother, Eleanor Bell Corprew, was 44. She married William M Swafford about 1766, in Randolph, North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 29 January 1839, in her hometown, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Peyton est née en 1746, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, son père, Benjamin William Peyton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Bell Corprew, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William M Swafford environ 1766, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 janvier 1839, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Peyton 1746 in Randolph, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Benjamin William Peyton 41 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Bell Corprew 44. Sie hat um 1766 in Randolph, North Carolina, British Colonial America William M Swafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Januar 1839 im Alter von 93 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Peyton è nata il nel 1746 nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Benjamin William Peyton, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Bell Corprew, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato William M Swafford circa 1766, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 gennaio 1839, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Peytonが1746年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフで生まれた時，父Benjamin William Peytonは41歳，母Eleanor Bell Corprewは44歳であった。約1766年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ランドルフでWilliam M Swaffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1839年1月29日に故郷で93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Peyton(이)가 1746년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Benjamin William Peyton(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Bell Corprew(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1766년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 William M Swafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1839년 1월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Peyton nasceu em 1746, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Benjamin William Peyton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Bell Corprew, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com William M Swafford aproximadamente 1766, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1839, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Peyton родилась в 1746 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Benjamin William Peyton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Bell Corprew, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William M Swafford около 1766 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 29 января 1839 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Peyton nació en 1746, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, su papá, Benjamin William Peyton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Eleanor Bell Corprew, tenía 44 años. Se casó con William M Swafford aproximadamente 1766, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de enero de 1839, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años.
